category_sources: source_facts.description identifies vcpkg as a C++ library manager.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name provides the project name vcpkg.
docs_sources: Official Microsoft Learn vcpkg documentation is hosted at learn.microsoft.com/en-us/vcpkg/.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description says C++ Library Manager; source_facts.executables lists the vcpkg CLI.
